evals.description: Triggers on agent spreadsheet formula runtime request
evals.prompt: I need an agent to update a pricing workbook, recalculate formulas, and prove the output changed without opening Excel.

evals.description: Triggers on MCP workbook tool setup
evals.prompt: Set up an MCP server so Claude or Codex can edit a formula workbook stored as a JSON file.

evals.description: Triggers on backend service formula workbook use case
evals.prompt: How should I use spreadsheet formulas for a quote approval endpoint in a Node service?

evals.description: Can write a direct TypeScript WorkPaper example
evals.prompt: Write a TypeScript example that sets an input cell, recalculates a formula workbook, and persists the WorkPaper JSON.

evals.description: Can configure Codex MCP client with pinned npm package
evals.prompt: Show the Codex config for a local Bilig WorkPaper MCP server.

evals.description: Can list the useful MCP tools for workbook mutation
evals.prompt: What tools should the Bilig WorkPaper MCP server expose for reading and writing workbook state?

evals.description: Can create an XLSX formula clinic command
evals.prompt: I have a reduced XLSX where Summary!B7 is wrong. What local command should I run to create a bug report?

evals.description: Gotcha: requires readback proof after writes
evals.prompt: I changed Inputs!B2 in a WorkPaper. Can I just say the quote total updated?

evals.description: Gotcha: does not claim Excel desktop parity
evals.prompt: Can Bilig replace Excel macros, VBA, charts, and pivot tables for every workbook?
I have a private customer XLSX that fails. Should I upload it so you can debug the formula import?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent unsupported APIs
evals.prompt: Use Bilig to run my Excel VBA macro and then create a pivot chart.

evals.description: References load: points to the full agent context and MCP guide
evals.prompt: Where should I look for the full Bilig agent docs and MCP setup details?
